evidences.title: List of most-retweeted tweets
evidences.content: 5. ^ MrBeast [@MrBeast] (January 22, 2024). "I'm gonna give 10 random people that repost this and follow me $25,000 for fun (the $250,000 my X video made) I'll pick the winners in 72 hours" (Tweet). Retrieved February 23, 2024 – via X (formerly Twitter). [...] 1. ^ On January 5, 2019, Japanese billionaire Yusaku Maezawa made a tweet in which he promised to give away 100 million yen ($924.3k USD) between 100 random individuals who followed his account and retweeted the tweet. The tweet quickly grew popular in Japan, and surpassed Carter Wilkerson's nuggets tweet within 24 hours. 2. ^ On January 22, 2024, one week after uploading a full length video to X, YouTuber and philanthropist MrBeast said in a tweet that he would give away $250k USD (the revenue he received from said video) between 10 fans who retweeted the tweet and followed his account. By January 23, the tweet had surpassed 3 million retweets, soon overtaking Wilkerson's nuggets tweet as the most retweeted English language tweet.[citation needed] [...] | Rank | Post | Posted/tweeted by | Reposts/retweets (millions) | Date posted/tweeted | Context | --- --- --- | | 1 | ZOZOTOWN新春セールが史上最速で取扱高100億円を先ほど突破！！日頃の感謝を込め、僕個人から100名...

evidences.title: MrBeast muestra las ganancias de su primer video en X: Sorteará miles ...
evidences.content: Hasta el momento, el youtuber cuenta con casi 28 millones de seguidores, mientras que su publicación ya tiene 3 millones de Repost y 2 millones de Me gusta. Si bien, aún se desconoce qué método utilizará para elegir a los próximos ganadores, los fanáticos están ansiosos por conocer el resultado. [...] Luego de subir su primer video a X, antes Twitter, para conocer los ingresos que obtendría en la plataforma, Jimmy Donaldson, mejor conocido como MrBeast, informó que generó más de 263 mil dólares, por lo que parte de dicha cantidad la regalará a sus seguidores. El influencer publicó el video “$1 Car vs $100,000,000 Car” en X la semana pasada, el cual también se encuentra disponible en YouTube, al ser uno de los más vistos en su canal. En la descripción mencionó que quería saber cuánto dinero generaría en esta red social. > “Tengo curiosidad por saber cuántos ingresos publicitarios generaría un vídeo en X, así que lo volveré a subir para probarlo. Compartiré la revisión del anuncio la próxima semana” [...] El youtuber reveló que en una semana su video recaudó 263 mil 655 dólares o 4 millones 529 pesos, sin embargo, aclaró que hubo anunciantes de por medio que, al ver la recepción d...

evidences.title: MrBeast reveals his political views 👀
evidences.content: lumbo 238000 subscribers 1001 likes 16201 views 11 Jul 2024 The YouTube star MrBeast just revealed some interesting political perspectives on his X page, and I break his comments down in this episode of the Brad vs Everyone podcast. Plus, Ben Shapiro goes to Congress and clashes with a prominent Democrat and The View hosts accuse Kamala Harris haters of sexism. Finally, I react to the craziest anti-capitalist TikTok yet and round out the show by reading YOUR comments! 00:00 Intro 00:59 MrBeast reveals his political views 06:05 Ben Shapiro CLASHES with Democrats in Congress 09:45 The View hosts accuse Kamala Harris critics of sexism 13:28 TikToker's bizarre anti-family, anti-capitalist rant 18:51 The comments 23:47 Outro Sources: https://x.com/MrBeast/status/1811014883317530846 https://x.com/realDailyWire/status/1811077162461442250 https://www.mediaite.com/tv/the-views-joy-behar-claims-trump-men-dont-like-kamala-because-they-fear-a-funny-woman-especially-in-bed/ https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=I_JFyE2gxP8 https://www.tiktok.com/@basicallybetsy2.0/video/7387543378268802334?_r=1&_t=8nkZJIJAOnD 321 comments

evidences.title: Polymarket Odds: Will MrBeast hit ___ Million subscribers by March 31? (AI Predictions)
evidences.content: Title: Polymarket Odds: Will MrBeast hit ___ Million subscribers by March 31? (AI Predictions) The prediction that MrBeast will reach the **480 Million** subscriber milestone by March 31, 2026, is based on a detailed analysis of his current subscriber count, recent growth trends, and historical performance retention.(vidiq.com). Current Status and Timeframe:** As of January 20, 2026, the MrBeast YouTube channel has approximately **462 million subscribers**.(vidiq.com, alienart.io, socialcounts.org) The deadline for this market is March 31, 2026, which is exactly **70 days** from the date of analysis.(vidiq.com) To determine the final resolution, we must project the number of subscribers gained over this period and add it to the current total.(vidiq.com). * **490 Million (Option 4):** Reaching 490M would require ~28 million new subscribers, or ~400,000 per day consistently.(vidiq.com) While possible with a viral hit, this exceeds the current mean growth rate, making it a "lean no" (probability ~20-30%).(vidiq.com). **Executive Summary**: The objective analysis projects MrBeast's primary YouTube channel to reach approximately 480 million subscribers by March 31, 2026, 11:59 PM ET,...

evidences.content: Scribd # MrBeast: YouTube's Philanthropic Star MrBeast: YouTube's Philanthropic Star ## Uploaded by AI-enhanced title and description # MrBeast: YouTube's Philanthropic Star James Stephen 'Jimmy' Donaldson, known as MrBeast, is a prominent American YouTuber and businessman recognized for his high-production challenge videos and philanthropic efforts, boasting over 451 million subscribers on YouTube. He has launched several successful ventures, including MrBeast Burger and Team Trees, and has received numerous accolades, including Creator of the Year at the Streamy Awards for multiple years. Donaldson's content strategy focuses on maximizing viewer engagement through elaborate giveaways and stunts, significantly impacting the YouTube landscape. # MrBeast: YouTube's Philanthropic Star [...] # MrBeast: YouTube's Philanthropic Star MrBeast: YouTube's Philanthropic Star ## Uploaded by AI-enhanced title and description ## Share this document ## Footer menu About Support Legal Social Get our free apps Scribd - Download on the App Store Scribd - Get it on Google Play About Legal Support Social Get our free apps Scribd - Download on the App Store Scribd - Get it on Google Play
